heading: Department of Defense payments by electronic transfers of funds: exercise of authority for waivers
label: 2786 Department of Defense payments by electronic transfers of funds: exercise of authority for waivers
text: With respect to any Federal payment of funds covered by (relating to electronic funds transfers) for which payment is made or authorized by the Department of Defense, the waiver authority provided in paragraph (2)(A)(i) of that section shall be exercised by the Secretary of Defense. The Secretary of Defense shall carry out the authority provided under the preceding sentence in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury.section 3332(f) of title 31
notes: Savings Provision, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–65, div. A, title X, § 1008(a)(3)113 Stat. 738Oct. 5, 1999“Any waiver in effect on the date of the enactment of this Act [] under paragraph (2)(A)(i) of , United States Code, shall remain in effect until otherwise provided by the Secretary of Defense under , United States Code, as added by paragraph (1).”Oct. 5, 1999section 3332(f) of title 31section 2786 of title 10
